LanguageData.nanocreate.degreeDatas.0.label: <color=#C0C0C0>nanocreate</color>
LanguageData.nanocreate.degreeDatas.0.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was once the pinnacle creation of a brilliant civilization, with countless nanomachines flowing through their bloodstream. Though abandoned on a rimworld, their creator heritage grants them abilities far beyond ordinary humans.
LanguageData.braveheart.degreeDatas.0.label: <color=#00CED1>braveheart</color>
LanguageData.braveheart.degreeDatas.0.description: [PAWN_nameDef] burns with an eternal warrior's flame, having survived countless battlefields. Death is merely another challenge to conquer, and protecting others is the very meaning of their existence.
LanguageData.pathfinder.degreeDatas.0.label: <color=#87CEEB>pathfinder</color>
LanguageData.pathfinder.degreeDatas.0.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a natural-born guide to the unknown, with footprints scattered across the deepest reaches of space. Every uncharted world becomes humanity's new home under their guidance - pioneering is their destiny.
